title: cacalia dura
intro: Cacalia dura is a perennial plant species, native to the mountainous regions of China and Japan, belonging to the family Compositae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cacalia dura include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Cacalia dura is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping its roots and rhizomes in hot water, which can be used to treat various ailments.
